_note: On codex >0.140 these plugin-manifest hooks are INERT — the plugin_hooks feature that loaded them was removed. The WORKING wiring is the $CODEX_HOME/config.toml [hooks] block that `zlauder-hooks codex-config enable` (driven by the enable skill) writes pointing at these same scripts. This file is retained for forward-compat / documentation. ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} is the env var codex injects for the plugin root; a bare ./ relative path is unsafe (resolves against the hook engine's CWD, not the plugin).
